allow: PowerShell($n = \(Get-Command node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\); if \($n\) { node -v } else { "no-node" }; $p = \(Get-Command npm -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\); if \($p\) { npm -v } else { "no-npm" })

PowerShell($tools = @{}; foreach\($c in 'python','py','npx','php'\){ $g=Get-Command $c -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if\($g\){ $tools[$c]=$g.Source } else { $tools[$c]='\(ausente\)' } }; $tools.GetEnumerator\(\) | ForEach-Object { "$\($_.Key\): $\($_.Value\)" })
